description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat green roof, surrounded by a well-maintained garden and a perimeter hedge. The front features a driveway with two parked cars, a covered entrance, and a small landscaped area. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and decorative lighting. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is dotted with several trees and shrubs, enhancing privacy and aesthetics. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a driveway, and a landscaped garden featuring a pool and patio. The property is enclosed by a hedge and dotted with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio seating, and large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more trees, the pool area, and the rear garden visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
